name: BT Catalog
changelog: New Performance filter under a Features group in the sidebar. It's an attribute, not a category, so it stacks on top of T-Shirts/Polos/etc. Items are flagged by fabric (moisture-wicking, Dri-FIT, PosiCharge, Sport-Wick, 100% poly performance, UPF), so performance styles with plain names like EG-PRO E152 and C2 Sport 5100 are caught. Tags on import and backfills existing items automatically on update.
